name: Gmail
tagline: Search and read Gmail mailbox data
description: Inspect the authenticated Gmail user's mailbox profile, search and retrieve messages, and list mailbox labels through the official Gmail API.

auth.hint: Enable the Gmail API in a Google Cloud project, complete the OAuth 2.0 consent flow with the narrowest required Gmail scope, and provide the resulting access token as a Bearer token. Reading message content normally requires the restricted gmail.readonly scope and may trigger Google verification requirements.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Gmail address, message and thread totals, and current mailbox history ID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's email address, or the special value me for the authenticated user.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List message IDs in a mailbox, optionally using Gmail search syntax and label filters.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's email address, or the special value me for the authenticated user.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum messages to return; defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 500.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token from nextPageToken for the next result page.

params.name: q
params.description: A Gmail search-box query; unavailable when authorized only with the gmail.metadata scope.

params.name: labelIds
params.description: Label IDs that every returned message must match.

params.name: includeSpamTrash
params.description: Whether to include messages from SPAM and TRASH; defaults to false.

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Retrieve one Gmail message by its message ID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's email address, or the special value me for the authenticated user.

params.name: id
params.description: Message ID, normally obtained from list_messages.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format: full, metadata, minimal, or raw.

params.name: metadataHeaders
params.description: Headers to include when format is metadata.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all labels in the authenticated user's Gmail mailbox.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's email address, or the special value me for the authenticated user.
